characters.appearance: Only a right hand is visible, featuring a medium-brown skin tone and neatly trimmed fingernails. The hand holds a white, cylindrical digital stylus.
characters.demeanor: Active and instructive, using the stylus to point, circle, and underline specific elements on the screen to guide the viewer's attention.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या ऑफिस में इंग्लिश बोलने में घबराहट होती है? [Do you feel nervous speaking English in the office?]
Character A says: कॉन्फिडेंस गिर जाता है ना? पर अब टेंशन मत लो। [Confidence drops, right? But don't worry now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a relatable workplace struggle.
- Replaces the original disparaging tone with an empathetic, older-sibling approach.
- Sets up the emotional need for a confidence-building solution.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आज ही से Supernova ऐप पर रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट इंग्लिश की प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। [Starting today, begin practicing English for just 15 minutes daily on the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the practical, daily solution.
- Emphasizes the low time commitment (15 minutes) to make learning feel achievable.
- Transitions smoothly from the problem to the app interface.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: फिर देखना, कैसे बिना डरे कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलते हो। [Then see how you speak English with confidence, without fear.]
Character A says: Supernova ऐप आपके लिए एकदम सही है। [Supernova app is perfect for you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff: speaking with confidence rather than just 'fluent' hype.
- Reinforces the Supernova brand name.
- Connects the visual of the confident speaker to the user's potential outcome.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova : Speaking App
Supernova App
Open

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: यहाँ आपको मिलेंगे रियल-लाइफ सिचुएशंस वाले डेली लेसन्स। [Here you will find daily lessons based on real-life situations.]
Character A says: Supernova पर आप इंटरव्यू या कस्टमर्स से बात करने के लिए स्पोकन इंग्लिश सीख सकते हैं। [On Supernova, you can learn spoken English for interviews or talking to customers.]
Character A says: हमारे एक्सपर्ट्स आपको हिंदी से इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाते हैं, वो भी स्टेप-बाय-स्टेप। [Our experts teach you to speak English from Hindi, that too step-by-step.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights Supernova's core value: real-world speaking situations and Hindi-medium instruction.
- Removes negative framing about ads and focuses purely on practical learning.
- Showcases the structured, step-by-step approach of the app.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: तो बस रोज़ 15 मिनट निकालो, लेसन्स देखो और हमारे AI ट्यूटर के साथ बोलकर प्रैक्टिस करो। [So just take out 15 minutes daily, watch lessons and practice speaking with our AI tutor.]
Character A says: यह बहुत ही अफोर्डेबल है। [It is very affordable.]
Character A says: फिर देखना, आपकी शानदार इंग्लिश सुनकर सब इम्प्रेस हो जायेंगे। [Then see, everyone will be impressed hearing your excellent English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Summarizes the daily habit loop: watch lessons, practice with AI tutor.
- Replaces the specific ₹1 trial claim with a brand-safe 'affordable' mention.
- Ends on an encouraging, positive note about impressing others.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
15 min
English AI
Online
Achha idea hai! Grammar se basics strong karna hamesha madadgar hota hai. English mein tenses bahut important hain, jaise ki 'Present Tense', 'Past Tense', aur 'Future Tense'.
Hum Present Tense se shuru kar sakte hain, jo hum daily life mein use karte hain. Kya aapko Present Simple Tense seekhna pasand hoga?
8:40 PM
Present Tense se shuru karte hain
8:41 PM
Great choice! Present Simple Tense hum tab use karte hain jab hum apni daily habits, routines, ya aisi baatein batate hain jo sach hain. Jaise "I eat breakfast every morning." (Main har subah nashta karta/karti hoon). Ismein verb ki first form use hoti hai.
Chaliye, aapki turn! Aap apni koi ek daily habit English mein batane ki koshish kijiye.
8:41 PM
Ek aur example do
Mujhe 'I play' se sentence banana hai

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो अभी इनस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button now and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, direct Call to Action.
- Directs the user to download the Supernova app.
